prompt.content: In the RMBS/SLAB merger analysis, what % cash consideration results in % accretion/dilution to SLAB shareholders equal to that of SLAB's share price growth from the close of the first trading day in 2025 to the last? Round to one decimal point.

rubrics.name: States cash consideration is 52.1% (acceptable range 51.6% to 52.6%) (ver_987225d7ddb04ba386317b70eb938bd8)

messages.content: States cash consideration is 52.1% (acceptable range 51.6% to 52.6%).
